title: Hasi's Mansion
description: Based on the "Luigi's Mansion" series as a fan mod
body:
Based on the "Luigi's Mansion" Game Series, implementing severel things

More can be seen on **Gallery** and **_Changelog_**

# Adding!

![Keybinds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67718e4798cf9d82dd9432a2a1d7129eac97353c_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Info</summary>

Nintendo, this is a **Fan Mod**, made by Hasi, so me. I have textured these Items and things by myself.
![after 0.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a69b63bf61fb4e518cc2ead3a1a3fb20ca4963f6.png)

- ~~made~~ _with **love**_
</details>


<details>
<summary>Sneak-peak Content</summary>

# Implementing these
**Poltergust G-00**
> Functions

If you right-click with it, and a Poltergust carring on your back, you can insert the Upgrades into your G-00.

If you have Upgrades inserted, you can left-click, to switch between them

![like this](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26137240bf5494484e45ac4f136f284988460535.png)
![inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0344a62808bc616ca9ecf2c49133b528bfbc2055.png)


If you have reached your last Upgrade; left-click and then right-click to go back to 1. 

If you haven't reached it; you go back once


**Keys/Elevator Button**
> Functions

Right-click to increase it's level. If you sneak and right-click, you decrease.

If you also have gone beneath 0, you have **B**, else you have **F**

![Key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88659af2bb7243769b15d788e174d87bbe108e01.png)


**Super-Suction (Socket)**
> Function

Press default **Z** to locate a nearby Socket, and only if you have a Poltergust wearing. Then you will be able to suck entities closer, like in "**Luigi's Mansion 3**"

![Suction](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dd036c42d8d91277c9404c68d40ac8cc23f8a5d.png)
</details>
